fields.Name: IT03 - Client GraphQL Cache Integrity
fields.Description: Ports client-cache-tests.ts C1-C12 against a running MJAPI via GraphQLDataProvider (CacheLocal opt-in, smart-cache current/stale). Requires a separately-running MJAPI + MJ_API_KEY; the bundle preflights MJAPI and fails fast when unreachable. CI provisioning of MJAPI is deferred to Phase 5, so this test is seeded Skip on the DB-only suite membership.

ExpectedOutcomes.summary: Per-field-subset client cache slots correct; stamp-less responses not cached; revalidation round-trips work.
